M0720_CU_PREP_MEAL (M0720) Current Preparing Light Meals Current ability to plan and prepare light meals. 00 = (a) Able to independently plan and prepare all light meals for self or reheat delivered meals; OR (b) Is physically, cognitively, and mentally able
